option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.ta.recruitment</groupId> <artifactId>ta-recruitment</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>war</packaging>
<name>TA Recruitment System</name> <description>BUPT International School TA Recruitment System - Java Servlet/JSP</description>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>8</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>8</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <failOnMissingWebXml>false</failOnMissingWebXml> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Java EE Servlet API (provided by Tomcat) --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId> <version>4.0.1</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- JSP API (provided by Tomcat) --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet.jsp</groupId> <artifactId>javax.servlet.jsp-api</artifactId> <version>2.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- JSTL for JSP tag library --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>jstl</artifactId> <version>1.2</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <finalName>ta-recruitment</finalName> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-war-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.2</version> <configuration> <failOnMissingWebXml>false</failOnMissingWebXml> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Tomcat 9 Maven Plugin for easy deployment --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.tomcat.maven</groupId> <artifactId>tomcat7-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>2.2</version> <configuration> <port>8080</port> <path>/ta-recruitment</path> <uriEncoding>UTF-8</uriEncoding> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.ta.recruitment</groupId> <artifactId>ta-recruitment</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>war</packaging>
<name>TA Recruitment System</name> <description>BUPT International School TA Recruitment System - Java Servlet/JSP</description>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>8</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>8</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <failOnMissingWebXml>false</failOnMissingWebXml> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Java EE Servlet API (provided by Tomcat) --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId> <version>4.0.1</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- JSP API (provided by Tomcat) --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet.jsp</groupId> <artifactId>javax.servlet.jsp-api</artifactId> <version>2.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- JSTL for JSP tag library --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>jstl</artifactId> <version>1.2</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <finalName>ta-recruitment</finalName> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-war-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.2</version> <configuration> <failOnMissingWebXml>false</failOnMissingWebXml> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Tomcat 9 Maven Plugin for easy deployment --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.tomcat.maven</groupId> <artifactId>tomcat9-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>2.2</version> <configuration> <port>8080</port> <path>/ta-recruitment</path> <uriEncoding>UTF-8</uriEncoding> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>
